onboarding.step3_broken_year_title: Are you sure about a non-calendar fiscal year?
onboarding.step3_broken_year_description: You've chosen a fiscal year that doesn't follow the calendar year (ending {endLabel}). Most Swedish companies use the calendar year (1 January to 31 December). You can change this later in settings, but only before you've posted anything.
onboarding.step3_fskatt_tip_body: F-skatt means you are responsible for paying tax and contributions to Skatteverket each month yourself.
onboarding.step3_fskatt_tip_note: Most business owners have F-skatt. Without F-skatt, your customers must withhold tax from your invoices.
onboarding.step3_fskatt_help: F-skatt means you are responsible for paying tax and contributions yourself.
onboarding.step3_fy_tip_body: Your fiscal year determines the period you keep books for. Most companies use the calendar year (Jan-Dec).
onboarding.step3_fy_tip_ef_note: Enskild firma must use the calendar year per BFL 3 kap.
onboarding.step3_fy_question: Which fiscal year are you bookkeeping for?
onboarding.step3_start_help: The date the company was registered. The first fiscal year can start any day.
onboarding.step3_no_valid_end: No valid end period found. Check the start date.
onboarding.step3_ef_calendar_required: Enskild firma must use the calendar year per BFL 3 kap.
onboarding.step3_when_fy_ends: When does the company's fiscal year end?
onboarding.step3_calendar_or_broken: Most use the calendar year (December). A non-calendar fiscal year ends in another month.
onboarding.step4_card_description: Enter your VAT registration and choose an accounting method.
onboarding.step4_vat_tip_title: Do I need to register for VAT?
onboarding.step4_vat_tip_body: Yes, if your turnover exceeds SEK 120,000 per year. With VAT you add 25% to your invoices but can also deduct VAT on your purchases.
onboarding.step4_vat_tip_note: If your turnover exceeds SEK 120,000 per year you need to register for VAT.
onboarding.step4_vat_registered_help: Required if your turnover exceeds SEK 120,000 per year.
onboarding.step4_vat_period_tip_title: How often do you report VAT?
onboarding.step4_vat_period_tip_body: Choose the period stated on Verksamt or in your decision from Skatteverket.
onboarding.step4_vat_period_bracket_low: Under SEK 1 million/year = Can choose yearly
onboarding.step4_period_help: Choose the period stated in your decision from Skatteverket. Usually quarterly or yearly.
onboarding.step4_method_tip: Faktureringsmetoden posts revenue and expenses when the invoice is sent/received. Kontantmetoden posts at payment.
onboarding.step4_method_accrual_desc: Revenue and expenses are posted when the invoice is sent or received, regardless of when payment occurs. This gives a more accurate view of the business's finances.
onboarding.step4_method_cash_desc: Revenue and expenses are posted only when payment actually occurs. Simpler to manage but gives a less precise view of the business's finances at any given moment.
onboarding.step4_cash_limit_note: Kontantmetoden may be used if annual net turnover is normally at most SEK 3 million (BFL 5 kap. 2 §).

settings_salary.title: Payroll settings
settings_salary.pay_day_help: Day of the month salaries are paid (1–28). Used as the default for new payroll runs and for reminders.
settings_salary.format_help: The format of the payment file you upload to your internet bank. pain.001 is the new standard all banks are moving to.
settings_salary.sunset_warning: Swedish banks are retiring Bankgirot Lön during 2026 — Swedbank stops accepting LB salary files on 1 August 2026, other banks during the autumn. Switch to ISO 20022 pain.001 well before your next salary payment.
settings_salary.bank_help: When selected, upload instructions for your bank are shown first on every payroll run.
settings_salary.vacation_info: The vacation rule (procentregeln 12% by default) and number of vacation days are set per employee.
settings_salary.voucher_series_help: Can be changed per payroll run. Each series has unbroken voucher numbers per fiscal year.
settings_salary.tax_tables_help: Tax tables and municipal tax rates are fetched automatically from Skatteverket's open data on every payroll run. No manual update is needed. If Skatteverket's API is unavailable, an embedded fallback copy is used until the service is back.
settings_salary.vacation_supplement_help: Applied with sammalöneregeln. Can be overridden per employee.
settings_salary.info_payroll_scope: The payroll module handles salaries for your employees: tax deductions, employer contributions, vacation pay liability and the employer declaration (AGI). If you run a sole proprietorship (enskild firma), you as the owner take money out via owner's drawings (account 2013), not salary. The module is for your employees.

salary_payments.title: Payment file for your bank
salary_payments.format_description_bg_lb: Legacy Bankgirot format. Being retired by the banks during 2026 — use pain.001 if your bank supports it.
salary_payments.format_description_pain001: ISO 20022 — the new payment file standard at Swedbank, SEB, Handelsbanken and Nordea.
salary_payments.sunset_warning: Swedish banks are retiring Bankgirot Lön during 2026 — Swedbank stops accepting LB salary files on 1 August 2026, other banks during the autumn. Switch to pain.001 in good time.
salary_payments.download_failed_title: Payment file could not be generated
salary_payments.instructions_toggle: How to import the file in your bank
salary_payments.instructions_footer: The amounts are pre-filled — all that remains is signing with BankID in your bank.
salary_payments.open_payments_note: Open Payments / direct payment via PSD2 (without file import) is planned for the future via Enable Banking. Initiation requires a separate PIS agreement — we will follow up once enough customers use salary payment files regularly.
salary_payments.steps_bg_lb_swedbank: Företagsbetalningar → Importera fil → choose LB format → upload and sign with BankID. Note: Swedbank stops accepting LB salary files after 1 August 2026.
salary_payments.steps_bg_lb_seb: Betalningar → Filöverföring → choose Bankgiro LB → upload and approve.
salary_payments.steps_bg_lb_handelsbanken: Betala → Filimport → choose LB → verify totals → sign. Note: Handelsbanken no longer accepts salary files via Bankgirot.
salary_payments.steps_bg_lb_nordea: Filimport → Bankgiro LB → upload → approve the payment.
salary_payments.steps_pain001_swedbank: Betala och överföra → Filtjänster → Upload file (ISO 20022 pain.001) → sign with BankID.
salary_payments.steps_pain001_seb: Betalningar → Import SEPA / ISO 20022 (pain.001) → upload and sign. The file must be received no later than 10:30 the day before the pay date.
salary_payments.steps_pain001_handelsbanken: Betala → Filimport → ISO 20022 → choose pain.001 → sign.
salary_payments.steps_pain001_nordea: Filimport in Nordea Business → Format pain.001 → upload → approve.
salary_payments.tax_ocr_note: The payment file uses your skattekonto OCR (org number + Luhn check digit). Skatteverket applies the payment to the amount you declared in the AGI for the period.
salary_payments.tax_download_failed_title: The payment file could not be generated

settings_backup.heading: Backup
settings_backup.intro: Download your own copy of all accounting data (SIE files, receipts, supporting documents and processing history) in a single ZIP file. The backup is your own copy for safety and portability. {appName} archives all accounting data for at least 7 years per BFL 7 kap. 2 §, so your backup does not replace our legal obligation; it complements it.

settings_banking.hb_business_poa_hint: Handelsbanken requires a power of attorney before business accounts can be connected: log in to the corporate online bank, go to Powers of attorney → Self-service services and enable "Internet Företag – tilläggstjänst API Företag". Then link the power of attorney to the person who will approve the connection and try again.

settings_booking_templates.description: Reusable templates for common bookkeeping transactions. Standard templates are shown to everyone; you can create and share your own.
settings_booking_templates.description_placeholder: When should this template be used?
settings_booking_templates.unconvertible_hint: This template can't be picked directly when booking a transaction: it's used from a journal entry. To appear in the transaction list, it needs exactly one cost/revenue line and one settlement line on opposite sides.
settings_booking_templates.ratio_help: Share of the total amount booked on this line. The shares should sum to 1.0.

extensions.page_description: Extend your bookkeeping system with tools and industry-specific features.
extensions.upsell_description: This feature is included in a paid subscription. Upgrade to enable it.
extensions.ext_enable_banking_description: Automatic bank transaction sync via PSD2
extensions.ext_enable_banking_long_description: Connect your bank account directly and sync transactions automatically via secure PSD2 bank integration. Supports most Swedish banks.
extensions.ext_email_description: Send invoices and reminders via email
extensions.ext_email_long_description: Enables email features: send invoices to customers, automatic payment reminders (15/30/45 days), and email notifications. Requires a Resend account with a verified domain.
extensions.ext_arcim_migration_description: Migrate bookkeeping from Fortnox, Visma, Bokio, Björn Lundén or Briox
extensions.ext_arcim_migration_long_description: Move all bookkeeping data from your old system to accounted. Imports chart of accounts, vouchers, customers, suppliers and open invoices automatically via a secure API integration directly with the provider.
extensions.ext_tic_description: Fetch company information automatically at signup
extensions.ext_tic_long_description: Auto-fill company details by entering an organization number. Retrieves address, VAT registration, F-tax status and bank details from public registries via TIC.
extensions.ext_mcp_server_description: Do bookkeeping via Claude, Cursor or another MCP client
extensions.ext_mcp_server_long_description: Exposes accounted's bookkeeping engine as MCP tools (Model Context Protocol). Connect your MCP client with an API key and do bookkeeping through conversation: list uncategorized transactions, book them, create invoices.
extensions.ext_cloud_backup_description: Sync backups to your own cloud storage
extensions.ext_cloud_backup_long_description: Connect your Google Drive account and upload a full backup with one click. Accounted creates a ZIP with SIE files, receipts and processing history and uploads it to a dedicated folder in your Drive. Perfect for meeting your own redundancy requirements.
extensions.ext_skatteverket_description: Submit the VAT declaration directly to Skatteverket via BankID.
extensions.ext_skatteverket_long_description: Connect to Skatteverket with BankID and submit your VAT declaration directly from accounted. Save drafts, validate, lock and sign: without leaving the app.
extensions.ext_invoice_inbox_description: Forward supplier invoices to a unique address: documents land here with extracted fields
extensions.ext_invoice_inbox_long_description: Each company gets a unique invoice inbox address. Invoices sent there are captured automatically and fields such as org. no., OCR, bankgiro, amount and due date are read with AI. Requires the AI feature in your subscription.

salary_calendar.bulk_worked_clear_desc: Worked time will be removed for {count, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}.
salary_calendar.bulk_worked_desc: {count, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} will be marked as worked. Existing hours for these dates will be overwritten.
salary_calendar.hours_zero_hint: Set to 0 to remove worked time on the selected days.
salary_calendar.conflicts_worked: {count, plural, one {# day was skipped} other {# days were skipped}} — combined with existing absence it would have exceeded 24 hours.
salary_calendar.bulk_absence_desc: {count, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} will be marked as absence. Sick pay calculation (sjuklön), karensavdrag and AGI reporting are derived automatically.
salary_calendar.conflicts_absence: {count, plural, one {# day was skipped} other {# days were skipped}} — combined with existing worked time it would have exceeded 24 hours.
salary_calendar.inspector_desc: Overview of worked time and absence on this day.

salary_employee.form_dimensions_hint: Suggested on salary cost lines when salary runs are booked.
salary_employee.form_vacation_semesterersattning_hint: 12 % is added to every salary run and booked against 7285. No vacation pay liability builds up — common for hourly and fixed-term employees.
salary_employee.form_bank_hint: Required before a salary run can be approved
salary_employee.bank_error_clearing_format: Clearing number must be 4 digits (or 5 digits starting with 8 for Swedbank)
salary_employee.bank_error_account_required: Account number is required when a clearing number is set
salary_employee.bank_error_clearing_required: Clearing number is required when an account number is set
salary_employee.bank_warn_checksum: The check digit looks off. Please double-check the number, you can still save.
salary_employee.new_vacation_none_hint: No accrual to 2920 is booked. Common for owners who are the only employee.
salary_employee.detail_deactivate_confirm: Do you want to deactivate this employee?
salary_employee.detail_employment_start_hint: The salary is prorated automatically if the employment starts or ends in the middle of a pay period.
salary_employee.detail_vacation_none_hint: No accrual to 2920 is booked. Use if vacation is included in the monthly salary — common for owners who are the only employee.
salary_employee.tax_form_tooltip: A-skatt: you withhold preliminary tax according to the tax table (skattetabell). F-skatt/FA-skatt: the person handles their own tax — no tax is withheld.
salary_employee.tax_sidoinkomst_tooltip: Check this if this is NOT the person's main employer. A flat 30 % tax is then withheld instead of according to the table.
salary_employee.tax_municipality_tooltip: The municipality where the person is registered (as of 1 November the previous year). It determines the tax table (skattetabell) — select a municipality and the table is filled in automatically.
salary_employee.tax_table_tooltip: Skatteverket's tables 29–42, based on the municipality's total tax rate. Derived automatically from the registered municipality.
salary_employee.tax_column_tooltip: The column in the tax table determines how the withholding is calculated, mainly based on age and income type. Suggested automatically from the personnummer.
salary_employee.tax_column_senior_warning: The person has turned 66 — select the column manually (salary = column 3, pension = column 2).
salary_employee.tax_no_table_sidoinkomst: Side income (sidoinkomst): a flat 30 % tax is withheld — no tax table is needed.
salary_employee.tax_no_table_f_skatt: With F-skatt or FA-skatt the person handles their own tax — no tax is withheld and no tax table is needed.
salary_employee.benefits_empty: No benefits registered. Active benefits are added automatically as rows in salary runs.
salary_employee.benefits_bike_hint: Skatteverket's standard rule: the first 3 000 kr/year is tax-free. The remainder is taxed monthly.
salary_employee.kommun_load_failed: Could not fetch the municipality list — type the municipality name and enter the tax table (skattetabell) manually.

salary_override.title: Advanced mode
salary_override.description: Adjust the tax deduction or employer contributions (arbetsgivaravgifter) for this employee — e.g. for R&D relief (FoU-avdrag) or adjusted withholding (jämkning). Adjusted values are used for bookkeeping and AGI reporting. Only allowed in review mode.
salary_override.reason_placeholder: E.g. FoU-avdrag 10 % on employer contributions, jämkning per decision from Skatteverket

salary_run_employee.calendar_hint_hourly: Select days and enter worked hours or absence. Base pay is calculated as hourly rate × total worked hours. Karensavdrag, sick pay (sjuklön) and AGI reporting are derived automatically.
salary_run_employee.calendar_hint_monthly: Mark sickness, VAB, parental leave and other absence per day. Karensavdrag, sick pay (sjuklön) and AGI reporting are calculated automatically.
salary_run_employee.no_line_items: No pay items. Run the calculation on the salary run to create standard items.

salary_tax_tables.source_api: Tax tables for {year} are fetched live from Skatteverket
salary_tax_tables.source_fallback: Skatteverket's API is unreachable — using local fallback data for {year}
salary_tax_tables.source_unavailable: Tax tables for {year} could not be fetched

time_tracking.title: Time tracking
time_tracking.no_billable_hours: No billable hours to invoice. Mark days as billable to collect them here.

import.title: Import
import.subtitle: Import bank transactions or bookkeeping data into your company
import.export_subtitle: Download your bookkeeping as a SIE file or back it up to Google Drive
import.sandbox_disabled: Bank connections and migration from other systems require a real account and are disabled in the sandbox. File-based imports (bank files, CSV/Excel and SIE) work as usual.
import.psd2_description: Connect your bank account directly and sync transactions automatically via PSD2.
import.migration_description: Nothing changes in your existing system.
import.bankfile_description: Import statements from your bank. Supports most Swedish banks.
import.csv_data_description: Import opening balances, customers, suppliers, or articles.
import.sie_description: Import journal entries and chart of accounts from another bookkeeping system.
import.export_sie_description: Export your bookkeeping as a SIE4 file for your accountant or for migrating to another system.
import.export_sie_no_period: Select a fiscal year to export.
import.export_sie_exclude_closing_label: Exclude year-end closing voucher (recommended for eDeklarera and systems that do their own year-end closing)

empty.invoices_description: Create your first invoice to get started.
empty.customers_description: Add your first customer to start invoicing.
empty.transactions_description: Transactions will appear here once your bank connection syncs.
empty.preset_invoices_description: Create your first invoice in under 60 seconds. We fill in your details automatically.
empty.preset_customers_description: Add your customers to easily create invoices and track payments.
empty.preset_transactions_description: Import bank statements to automatically post entries and stay on top of your finances.
empty.preset_receipts_description: Snap a photo of a receipt for automatic reading and posting. We handle the rest!
empty.preset_deadlines_description: Great work! You have no immediate deadlines to handle.
empty.preset_no_bank_description: Import bank statements to automatically post entries and get a better view of your finances.
empty.preset_reports_description: Reports are generated automatically once you have enough data. Start by creating invoices or importing transactions.
